MoveOutEips.id: The ID of the shared bandwidth
MoveOutEips.clientToken: Idempotency token, see [clientToken](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
MoveOutEips.moveOutEips: List of EIPs to be removed, including IPv4 EIPs and IPv6 EIPs
MoveOutEips.moveOutEips.eip: The IP address of the EIP to be removed
MoveOutEips.moveOutEips.bandwidthInMbps: Bandwidth value of the EIP after removal, in Mbps (required only for EIPs originally provisioned under shared bandwidth)
MoveOutEips.moveOutEips.billing: Billing information of the EIP after removal, only postpaid is supported (required only for EIPs originally provisioned under shared bandwidth)
